name: wrap-text
title: Wrap Text
description: Wrap selected text with brackets, quotes, parentheses, or curly braces — instantly.
author: candemet

commands.name: wrap_single_quotes
commands.title: Wrap with Single Quotes
commands.description: Wrap highlighted text with single quotes

commands.name: wrap_double_quotes
commands.title: Wrap with Double Quotes
commands.description: Wrap highlighted text with double quotes

commands.name: wrap_curly
commands.title: Wrap with Curly Brackets
commands.description: Wrap highlighted text with curly brackets

commands.name: wrap_custom
commands.title: Wrap with Custom Characters
commands.description: Wrap highlighted text with custom character(s). Enter 1 char to wrap both sides, or 2 chars for left/right.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
